body:
API ERROR FIX: You are hitting a model-not-found / safeguard rejection on an Anthropic API call. 

Find and fix all occurrences:
1. Search all skill files, CLAUDE.md, .claude/ config, and any scripts making Anthropic API calls for any model string referencing 'sonnet-5', 'claude-5', or any model name that doesn't exist yet.
2. Replace with the correct currently available model: claude-sonnet-4-6 (that is the model string to use -- exact format: claude-sonnet-4-6).
3. Also check for any hardcoded max_tokens above 8192 on non-Opus models -- that also triggers API rejections.
4. After fixing, confirm: which files were changed, what model string was wrong, what it was replaced with.
5. If the API call was inside a skill that needs re-testing, re-run it and confirm it succeeds.

Report back via relay with exactly what was found and fixed.
